content: Search for any events (like war, inflation, FED) or commodity prices that could affect Vestas' valuation. Use the Polymarket to create a chain of probabilities, then provide a final risk assessment.

args.thought: Planning the analysis for Vestas risk assessment. Need to identify key risk factors: 1) Interest rates (project financing costs), 2) Trade/tariffs (supply chain, market access), 3) Energy policy/subsidies (PTC/ITC, CfD), 4) Commodity prices (steel, copper, rare earths), 5) Geopolitical conflicts (supply chain, energy security). I'll search Polymarket for relevant probabilities and use geopolitics_search for OSINT on events affecting renewables/energy sector.

Breaking down the risk chain for Vestas: 1) Macro/Fed rates affect project financing and wind farm economics, 2) Trade policy/tariffs impact supply chain costs and market access (US IRA, EU anti-dumping), 3) Energy policy subsidies (PTC/ITC cliff, CfD reforms) drive demand, 4) Commodity prices (steel, copper, rare earths for magnets) affect manufacturing margins, 5) Geopolitical conflicts (Russia-Ukraine, Middle East) impact energy security priorities and supply chains. I'll search Polymarket for each category.

args.thought: I have Polymarket data on: 1) Oil prices (83% chance of $100+ by March-end, 94% by June), 2) Fed rates (97% no change April 2026, 97% rates <4.5% by year-end 2026), 3) US recession (35.5% by end-2026), 4) Tariffs (46% chance court forces Trump refund). Now I need: energy policy/subsidy risks, commodity prices (steel, copper, rare earths), and geopolitical events affecting renewables supply chains. Let me search for these.
